_comment: DEFERRED / NOT APPLIED (2026-06-24): this is the ready-to-apply trunk ruleset for climasite, kept as an artifact for when the repo is on a GitHub plan that supports it. On the current Free plan for this personal public repo, BOTH the `merge_queue` rule AND `evaluate` enforcement are rejected (422 — merge queue needs Team/Enterprise; evaluate needs Enterprise). Until then the EXISTING classic branch protection is the gate (6 required checks incl. Test Summary, admins-included, no force-push/delete, PR-required) and the `merge_group` trigger in test.yml sits inert-but-ready. RECONCILED to climasite's CI: the required context is 'Test Summary' — the aggregator that needs[] every gate. To apply once on a supporting plan: gh api --method POST repos/byrzohod/climasite/rulesets --input <(jq 'del(._comment)|.enforcement="evaluate"' this-file), validate a real merge_group run reports Test Summary green, then flip enforcement to active. See docs/runbooks/merge-queue.md.
name: trunk-default-branch-protection
